items.briefing:
Two threats worth noting today: a lone attacker recently compromised an Amazon Web Services cloud environment in just 72 hours using AI-assisted techniques, highlighting how quickly cloud systems can be targeted. Separately, a malware campaign called Vidar is actively hitting small and medium businesses through fake online ads, stealing passwords and sensitive data. Both threats are relevant to Australian organisations, including RTOs, that rely on cloud services or have staff clicking on sponsored search results.

**Practical tip:** Remind staff to avoid clicking on sponsored or paid search results when downloading software — go directly to the official website instead.

featured.title: Telstra mobile outage disrupts services across Australia
featured.quote: Major national infrastructure outage reveals critical vulnerability in Australia's telecommunications resilience.
